menu_items.name: The Patty Meltdown
menu_items.description: A legendary, caramelized Prime Rib smashburger seared to perfection. Topped with tender grilled onions, a melt of Swiss and American, and our Sweet & Tangy sauce on toasted Sourdough.

menu_items.name: The Smashburger
menu_items.description: Our signature Prime Rib & Fat blend, seared with burger seasoning. Served on a brioche roll with choice of cheese and toppings.

menu_items.name: The Savory Italian
menu_items.description: Soppressata salami paired with melted Provolone and Mozzarella, finished with sweet balsamic onions on sourdough.

menu_items.name: The Traditional
menu_items.description: Sharp Cheddar and American cheese melted between thick slices of grilled Texas Toast.

menu_items.name: The Mac Attack
menu_items.description: Five Star Bacon Mac & Cheese loaded with bacon bits, melted between thick Texas Toast.

menu_items.name: The Spicy Melt
menu_items.description: Pepper Jack cheese, fresh jalapeños, and zesty Sriracha Aioli on toasted Sourdough.

menu_items.name: BBQ Bacon Melt
menu_items.description: Smoky Gouda, thick-cut bacon, caramelized onions, and BBQ drizzle on Sourdough.

menu_items.name: The Southwest
menu_items.description: Cheddar, fire-roasted corn and peppers, and chipotle spread on Texas Toast.

menu_items.name: The Truffle Melt
menu_items.description: Gruyere cheese, sautéed mushrooms, fresh thyme, and truffle oil drizzle on toasted Sourdough.

menu_items.name: Five Star Bacon Mac & Cheese
menu_items.description: Velvety Velveeta, aged white cheddar, and smoky gouda with heavy cream and bacon bits.

menu_items.name: The Mac-Topper
menu_items.description: Add a golden scoop of Bacon Mac inside any sandwich.

menu_items.name: Bacon (3 pcs) or Baked Ham
menu_items.description: Crispy thick-cut bacon or baked ham to any sandwich.

menu_items.name: Signature Sauces
menu_items.description: Sweet & Tangy · Sriracha Aioli · Chipotle Spread · BBQ Drizzle · Truffle Oil

truck_status.note: We are parked right in front of the public library! Come grab lunch!
truck_status.home_address: Cheezies Gourmet Home Base, Akron, OH
